payload.description: submit_score_code in ScoreEditorToolset had a disk fallback path that read stale content from /tmp/plexus_score_edit_exchange.yaml. When str_replace_editor failed and content was unchanged, it submitted the stale exchange file as a new version. Fix: removed disk fallback, added unchanged content guard. Also updated agent prompt to call done(cannot_improve) on edit failures.
payload.title: submit_score_code submits unchanged YAML when str_replace_editor fails
